## CLI Changes

### Description
Brief description of changes to the Phala Cloud CLI

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New command/feature
- [ ] Breaking change (command/option that would cause existing usage to break)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring

### Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have run `bun run fmt` and committed any formatting changes
- [ ] I have run `bun run lint` and fixed any linting issues
- [ ] I have run `bun run type-check` and resolved any type errors
- [ ] I have run `bun run test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have tested the CLI commands locally
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (COMMANDS.md, README.md) accordingly

### CLI Testing
- [ ] Tested with `bun run build && bun link`
- [ ] Verified commands work as expected
- [ ] Tested error handling and edge cases
- [ ] Verified help text is correct (`phala <command> --help`)

### Breaking Changes
<!-- If this PR contains breaking changes, describe:
- What commands/options are affected
- Migration guide for users
- Deprecation timeline (if applicable)
-->

### New Commands (if applicable)
<!-- If adding new commands, describe:
- Command syntax: `phala <command> [options]`
- Purpose and use cases
- Example usage
-->

### Additional Notes
